description_long: This is a classic steam locomotive with a cylindrical boiler, a prominent smokestack at the front, and a large cab at the rear. The locomotive features three large spoked driving wheels on each side, painted in a dark red color, and a series of mechanical linkages connecting them. The body is primarily matte black, with subtle metallic details and a slightly weathered appearance. The front of the train has a circular headlamp and a cowcatcher, while the cab at the rear is boxy with small windows. The overall design is robust and industrial, typical of early 20th-century steam engines. There are no visible carriages attached, and the train appears to be a standalone engine.
description: A matte black steam locomotive with red spoked wheels, a cylindrical boiler, and a boxy rear cab. Features include a smokestack, headlamp, and mechanical linkages.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular headlamp, smokestack, and cowcatcher, with the cylindrical boiler extending back.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the three large red spoked wheels, mechanical linkages, and the full length of the boiler and cab.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back of the cab and the roof, with minimal detail visible.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the wheels, boiler, and cab, but from the opposite side.
attribute_door_placement: doors at each end of the cab
